metadata.website_type: sports consultancy and wellbeing services website

tasks.name: Book the cheapest 60-minute running technique consultation after 5:00 pm next Tuesday
tasks.description: Find 1:1 running technique consultations, filter for 60-minute sessions available next Tuesday after 5:00 pm, sort by price, and book the cheapest available slot for one person.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click on the main navigation menu option labeled "Consultations" or "1:1 Coaching."
On the consultations page, use the service type filter and select "Running Technique" from the list of services.
Use the duration filter and select "60 minutes" as the session length.
Open the date picker, choose next Tuesday's date, and then use the time-of-day filter to select sessions starting at or after 5:00 pm.
Use the sort dropdown above the results and select "Price: Low to High."
From the filtered and sorted list, click on the first consultation option shown (the cheapest available 60-minute running session that meets the criteria).
On the consultation details page, choose the next available time slot listed after 5:00 pm on next Tuesday and set the number of participants to 1 if a quantity selector is available.

Scroll to the booking form section and fill in the required fields with sample data (e.g., name, phone number, and email), then click the "Book Now" or "Continue" button to add this consultation to the booking summary page.

tasks.name: Purchase the highest-rated 4-week stress management program under $120
tasks.description: Find online wellbeing programs focused on stress management, filter for 4-week programs under $120 with rating at least 4.5 stars, and add the highest-rated one to the cart.
steps: From the homepage, click on the main navigation link labeled "Programs" or "Online Programs."
On the programs page, use the category or topic filter to select "Stress Management" or the closest matching topic.
Use the duration filter and select programs labeled "4 weeks" or with a 4-week duration option.
Open the price filter control, set the maximum price to $120, and apply the price filter.
Use the rating filter to show only programs with a rating of at least 4.5 stars.
Open the sort options dropdown and choose "Rating: High to Low" so that the highest-rated programs appear first.
Click on the first program card in the sorted list that shows a price of $120 or less.
On the program detail page, select a start date in the date selector that falls within the next 30 days and keep the default access level or choose a "Standard" tier if a tier dropdown is available.
Click the "Add to Cart" or "Enroll" button to add this 4-week stress management program to the shopping cart.

tasks.name: Book two non-overlapping moderate-intensity morning group classes on the same day
tasks.description: Find group fitness classes for an upcoming Saturday, filter for moderate intensity and durations under 45 minutes in the morning, and book two different classes whose start times are at least 30 minutes apart.
steps: From any page, click the navigation link labeled "Classes" or "Group Sessions."
On the classes schedule page, open the date picker and select the next upcoming Saturday from the calendar.
Use the time-of-day filter to select morning hours only (for example, 8:00 am to 12:00 pm).
Use the intensity filter to select "Moderate" intensity, and use the duration filter to show only classes with durations of 45 minutes or less.
Scroll through the filtered list and note the start times; then click on one class card that begins between 8:00 am and 10:30 am to open its details.
On that class detail page, choose the selected Saturday date (if required), set the number of attendees to 1, and click the "Book" or "Add to Schedule" button to add the first class to your bookings.

Return to the classes schedule for the same Saturday and morning time range, then select a second moderate-intensity class with a start time at least 30 minutes after the end time of the first class you booked.

On the second class detail page, select the same Saturday date, set the number of attendees to 1, and click the "Book" or "Add to Schedule" button so that both classes appear in your bookings or cart.

tasks.name: Create a weekly training plan using 3 workout templates with specific duration and type criteria
tasks.description: Use the training planner to add three different workout templates to a weekly plan: a cardio session under 30 minutes on Monday, a strength session between 30–45 minutes on Wednesday, and a mobility or stretching session of at least 20 minutes on Friday, then save the plan.
steps: From the homepage, click the navigation link labeled "Tools" or "Training Planner."
On the training planner page, click a button such as "Create New Plan" or "Start New Week" to begin a new weekly plan.
Open the workout template library and use the type filter to select "Cardio" workouts, then use the duration filter to show only workouts with durations less than 30 minutes.
From the filtered cardio templates, click on one template and use the planner controls to assign it to Monday at any time slot that is available (for example, 7:00 am).
Return to the workout template library, set the type filter to "Strength" and use the duration filter to show workouts between 30 and 45 minutes.
Select one strength workout template that meets the criteria and assign it to Wednesday in the weekly calendar at a suitable time slot (for example, 6:00 pm).
Again open the template library, set the type filter to "Mobility" or "Stretching," and use the duration filter or sort to find a workout with a duration of at least 20 minutes.
Choose one mobility or stretching template that meets the duration requirement and assign it to Friday at any time slot in the weekly plan.
Enter a plan name such as "Balanced Week Plan" into the plan name field, then click the "Save Plan" or "Save Schedule" button to store this weekly training plan.

tasks.name: Add the best-value nutrition coaching bundle under $250 to cart based on total minutes
tasks.description: Find nutrition coaching bundles under $250, sort by price, compare the two cheapest options, choose the bundle that offers more total coaching minutes, and add it to the cart.
steps: From any page, click on the "Services" or "Coaching" navigation link and then choose the "Nutrition Coaching" or similar subcategory.
On the nutrition coaching page, use the product type filter to show only "Bundles" or multi-session packages.
Open the price filter, set the maximum price to $250, and apply the filter so that only bundles priced at $250 or less are displayed.
Use the sort dropdown to select "Price: Low to High" and scroll so that the cheapest bundles appear at the top of the results.

Identify the first two bundle cards in the sorted list and click on the first bundle to open its detail page, noting the total number of minutes or total session time listed in the bundle description.

Use the site navigation (such as a back button or breadcrumb) to return to the bundle list and click on the second cheapest bundle to open its detail page, again noting the total minutes or total session time.
Based on the total minutes descriptions, decide which of the two bundles under $250 offers the greater total coaching time and navigate back to that specific bundle’s detail page if needed.

On the chosen bundle’s detail page, select any required options such as "Start within 30 days" or preferred coach (if a dropdown is provided), then click the "Add to Cart" or "Enroll" button so that this bundle is added to the cart.

tasks.name: Join a free 7-day wellbeing email challenge starting next Monday at 8:00 am with selected themes
tasks.description: Locate the free 7-day wellbeing challenge, set the start date to next Monday and daily email time to 8:00 am, choose both 'Sleep' and 'Mindfulness' as themes, and submit the sign-up form.
steps: From the homepage, click on the navigation item labeled "Challenges" or "Programs" and then choose the section for "Free Challenges" if available.
On the challenges list, find and click the card or link for a "7-Day Wellbeing Challenge" or similarly titled 7-day free program.
On the challenge detail page, click the "Join Now" or "Sign Up" button to open the registration form.
In the registration form, enter a sample first name in the name field (for example, "Alex") and enter a sample email address in the email field (for example, "alex@example.com").
Use the start date selector to choose the next Monday’s date as the beginning of the 7-day challenge.
Open the time-of-day dropdown or time picker and select 8:00 am as the preferred delivery time for the daily emails or reminders.
In the list of topics or themes, tick the checkboxes for "Sleep" and "Mindfulness" and leave any other topics unchecked.
Scroll to the bottom of the form and click the "Join Challenge," "Start Challenge," or equivalent button to submit the registration with the chosen date, time, and themes.

tasks.name: Save three short wellbeing articles from different topics to your reading list
tasks.description: Use the resources section to find and save three articles to a reading list: one about injury prevention for runners, one about mental resilience, and one about nutrition, each with an estimated reading time under 10 minutes.
steps: From any page, click the navigation link labeled "Resources," "Blog," or "Articles."
On the articles page, use the search bar to type "injury prevention for runners" and press Enter or click the search icon.

From the search results, locate an article whose title or tags relate to running injury prevention and that shows an estimated read time of less than 10 minutes, then click on its title to open the article page.
On the open article page, click the "Save," "Bookmark," or "Add to Reading List" button so that this running injury prevention article is added to your reading list.
Return to the main articles page using the site navigation and use the category or tag filters to select a topic such as "Mental Resilience" or "Mindset."
Within that topic’s articles, scroll and choose an article with a read time indicator under 10 minutes, then open it and click the "Save" or "Add to Reading List" button.
Navigate back to the articles overview again and use either the search bar to type "nutrition" or the category filters to select a "Nutrition" or "Fueling" category.

From the nutrition-related articles that appear, pick one with a listed reading time of less than 10 minutes, open it, and click the "Save," "Bookmark," or "Add to Reading List" button to add this third article to your reading list.

tasks.name: Build a monthly gym + yoga subscription with a combined cost under $180
tasks.description: Choose a monthly gym access membership and a weekly yoga class add-on so that the total monthly cost displayed in the cart is below $180, adjusting the yoga option if necessary before proceeding to checkout.
steps: From the homepage, click on the navigation link labeled "Memberships" or "Plans."
On the memberships page, use the billing period filter to show only "Monthly" plans and use the benefits filter to select plans that include "Gym Access."

From the list of monthly gym access plans, select a plan priced at $150 or less by clicking its card to open the plan details, then click the "Select Plan" or "Add to Cart" button to add it to your cart.
Locate a section or link for "Add-ons" or "Class Passes" on the memberships or cart page and click it to view yoga class options.
Among the yoga add-ons, choose an option that provides at least 1 yoga class per week, click on its card, and then click the "Add" or "Add to Cart" button to add it to your cart.
Open or navigate to the cart or subscription summary page using the cart icon or "View Cart" link in the header.

If the combined monthly total shown in the cart exceeds $180, click the remove or delete icon next to the current yoga add-on, then return to the yoga add-ons list and select a cheaper yoga option before adding it to the cart again.
Once the combined monthly total for the gym membership and yoga add-on shown in the cart is below $180, click the "Proceed to Checkout" or "Continue" button to move to the checkout details page.

entities.name: ConsultationService
entities.description: Template for 1:1 consultations such as running technique, strength coaching, and wellbeing sessions.

fields.name: tags
fields.description: Free-form tags for filtering/searching

entities.name: ConsultationTimeSlot
entities.description: Bookable time slots for a specific consultation service on specific dates and times.

entities.name: Program
entities.description: Online multi-week programs such as stress management courses and performance plans.

fields.name: tags
fields.description: Free-form tags for search (e.g., '4_weeks')

entities.name: ProgramTier
entities.description: Pricing tiers or access levels (e.g., Standard, Premium) for a program.

entities.name: GroupClass
entities.description: Template for a recurring group class type (e.g., strength, yoga, conditioning).

entities.name: GroupClassSession
entities.description: Scheduled occurrence of a group class on a specific date and time.

entities.name: WorkoutTemplate
entities.description: Pre-defined workout templates used in the weekly training planner.

entities.name: TrainingPlan
entities.description: Saved weekly training plans composed of workout templates.

entities.name: TrainingPlanItem
entities.description: Individual scheduled workouts within a training plan.

fields.name: start_time
fields.description: Time of day in HH:MM format (24h)

entities.name: NutritionBundle
entities.description: Nutrition coaching bundles and other nutrition products, emphasizing total coaching minutes.

fields.name: preferred_coach_ids
fields.description: Array of Coach IDs that can deliver this bundle

fields.name: tags
fields.description: Free-form tags for search/filtering

entities.name: Coach
entities.description: Coaches and trainers delivering consultations, classes, and bundles.

fields.name: specialties
fields.description: Free-form list of specialties (e.g., 'injury prevention')

entities.name: MembershipPlan
entities.description: Gym and facility membership plans with recurring billing.

fields.name: benefits
fields.description: Array of benefit codes such as 'gym_access', 'group_classes', 'pool_access', 'sauna_access', 'online_programs_access', 'yoga_classes', 'other_benefit'

fields.name: max_yoga_classes_per_week
fields.description: Number of yoga classes per week included in the base membership (0 if none)

entities.name: AddOn
entities.description: Add-ons such as yoga class passes that can be attached to memberships.

fields.name: classes_per_week
fields.description: Number of classes per week included (relevant for class/yoga add-ons)

entities.name: Challenge
entities.description: Short-term challenges such as free 7-day wellbeing email challenges.

fields.name: default_themes
fields.description: Available theme codes such as 'sleep', 'mindfulness', 'nutrition', 'movement', 'stress', 'recovery', 'general_wellbeing'

entities.name: ChallengeRegistration
entities.description: User registrations for specific challenges, including start date, time, and selected themes.

fields.name: preferred_email_time
fields.description: Preferred daily email time in HH:MM format (24h), e.g., '08:00'

fields.name: selected_themes
fields.description: Array of theme codes such as 'sleep', 'mindfulness', 'nutrition', 'movement', 'stress', 'recovery', 'general_wellbeing'

entities.name: Article
entities.description: Wellbeing, performance, nutrition, and mindset articles with metadata for filtering and reading time.

fields.name: tags
fields.description: Free-form tags for search such as 'injury prevention', 'runners'

entities.name: ReadingList
entities.description: Saved articles the single user has bookmarked for later reading.

fields.name: article_ids
fields.description: Array of Article IDs saved to the reading list

entities.name: Cart
entities.description: Shopping cart and booking summary for consultations, classes, programs, bundles, memberships, and add-ons.

fields.name: items
fields.description: Array of CartItem IDs currently in the cart

entities.name: CartItem
entities.description: Individual item in the cart, referencing a specific consultation slot, class session, program, bundle, membership, or add-on.

fields.name: reference_id
fields.description: Generic reference to the primary entity (e.g., Program ID, MembershipPlan ID) when a more specific field is not used

fields.name: consultation_time_slot_id
fields.description: For consultation items, the ConsultationTimeSlot ID

fields.name: program_id
fields.description: For program enrollments, the Program ID

fields.name: program_tier_id
fields.description: For program enrollments, the selected ProgramTier ID

fields.name: program_start_date
fields.description: Start date selected for a program enrollment

fields.name: group_class_session_id
fields.description: For class bookings, the GroupClassSession ID

fields.name: attendees
fields.description: Number of attendees for class or consultation bookings

fields.name: bundle_id
fields.description: For nutrition bundle items, the NutritionBundle ID

fields.name: membership_plan_id
fields.description: For membership items, the MembershipPlan ID

fields.name: add_on_id
fields.description: For add-on items, the AddOn ID

fields.name: start_date
fields.description: Generic start date for recurring items like memberships/add-ons

fields.name: contact_name
fields.description: Booking form participant name for consultations/classes when captured at item level

entities.name: Order
entities.description: Checkout confirmation capturing purchaser details and final pricing for all items.

fields.name: cart_id
fields.description: ID of the Cart this order was created from

fields.name: subtotal_one_off
fields.description: Total of one-off purchases (consultations, classes, programs, bundles)

fields.name: subtotal_recurring_monthly
fields.description: Combined monthly total for recurring items (memberships, add-ons)

fields.name: items
fields.description: Array of OrderItem IDs in this order

entities.name: OrderItem
entities.description: Snapshot of each item included in an order at checkout time.

fields.name: reference_id
fields.description: Reference to original catalog entity (e.g., Program ID, MembershipPlan ID)

fields.name: start_date
fields.description: Start date for the booked service or subscription

entities.name: ContactInquiry
entities.description: Messages submitted via the About/Contact form.
